instruction: Open Notes and create a new note titled {TITLE} containing the text {BODY}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §9 slice 4, §10 Notes template); Tier-C AppleScript reads the note body by title

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to delete (every note whose name is "{TITLE}")' 2>/dev/null || true
osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to make new note with properties {name:"{TITLE}", body:"{BODY}"}' 2>/dev/null || true

result.script: tell application "Notes" to return body of first note whose name is "{TITLE}"
